TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Maybalay, title = Maybalay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Maybalay} }

S.FORM: Maybalay Itiniay i Wufeng Cen no Hsinchu ko Maybalay a niyaro', 35 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 70 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 81% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 57 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 19% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 13 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 74%, Saysiyat 7%.
S.PHON: majb~b~va…ĺaj itiniaj i wo~u~uf…ôŇč ¶…ôn no~u ńßsin ¶ńßo~u~u ko~u majb~b~va…ĺaj a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ **%, sajsijat *%.
S.FORM: Maybalay Itiniay i Wufeng Cen no Hsinchu ko Maybalay a niyaro', 35 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 70 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 81% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 57 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 19% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 13 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 74%, Saysiyat 7%.
